name: Studio Dark
description: Music production theme with deep purple foundations, cyan waveforms, and magenta highlights. Electric and creative aesthetic for DAW interfaces, mixing consoles, and audio production tools.

decorators.studio-wave: Cyan waveform displays with glowing stroke and animated playhead. Audio visualization aesthetic.
decorators.studio-channel: Vertical channel strips with fader, meter, and knob stack. Mixing console layout.
decorators.studio-meter: VU meter styling with gradient fill from cyan through yellow to magenta at peak.
decorators.studio-knob: Circular control knobs with cyan indicator and rotational value display.
decorators.studio-glow-cyan: Cyan glow effects on active elements using box-shadow and text-shadow.
decorators.studio-glow-magenta: Magenta glow on peaks, alerts, and secondary highlights.
decorators.studio-rack: Equipment rack styling with 1U slot dividers and industrial metal aesthetic.
decorators.studio-beat: Beat grid lines with subdivision markers for timeline and arrangement views.

daw.description: Digital audio workstation with track arrangement, mixer view, and transport controls.

mixer.description: Mixing console with channel strips, busses, and master section.

marketing.description: Music production marketing with waveform visuals and electric color palette.

library.description: Sample library browser with waveform previews and tag filtering.

studio-wave.description: Cyan waveform displays with glowing stroke and animated playhead. Audio visualization aesthetic.
studio-wave.intent: Use for all audio visualization including waveforms, spectrum analyzers, and sample previews.

studio-channel.description: Vertical channel strips with fader, meter, and knob stack. Mixing console layout.
studio-channel.intent: Use for mixer channel strips with vertical fader and stacked controls. Reproduces console aesthetic.

studio-meter.description: VU meter styling with gradient fill from cyan through yellow to magenta at peak.
studio-meter.intent: Use for level meters, peak indicators, and VU displays. Standard audio metering color progression.

studio-knob.description: Circular control knobs with cyan indicator and rotational value display.
studio-knob.intent: Use for rotary controls like gain, pan, filter, and send knobs. Classic hardware-style rotary knobs.

studio-glow-cyan.description: Cyan glow effects on active elements using box-shadow and text-shadow.
studio-glow-cyan.intent: Use for active/selected elements and primary highlights. Creates electric, energetic feel.

studio-glow-magenta.description: Magenta glow on peaks, alerts, and secondary highlights.
studio-glow-magenta.intent: Use for peak warnings, recording indicators, and secondary accent highlights. Hot signal aesthetic.

studio-rack.description: Equipment rack styling with 1U slot dividers and industrial metal aesthetic.
studio-rack.intent: Use for equipment rack layouts and plugin host windows. Reproduces 19-inch rack unit aesthetic.

studio-beat.description: Beat grid lines with subdivision markers for timeline and arrangement views.
studio-beat.intent: Use for timeline grids, beat markers, and arrangement views. Essential for rhythm-based editing.

suggested_properties.background-image: repeating-linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(34, 211, 238, 0.2) 0, rgba(34, 211, 238, 0.2) 1px, transparent 1px, transparent 40px), repeating-linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(34, 211, 238, 0.08) 0, rgba(34, 211, 238, 0.08) 1px, transparent 1px, transparent 10px)
